summary: Recorded the core search/RAG architecture decision (pgvector + tsvector + RRF, OpenAI embeddings, Vercel AI SDK on SvelteKit 2/adapter-node), three build gotchas as learnings (postgres-js db.execute returns rows directly; AI SDK v4 streamText exposes async textStream; $env/dynamic/private breaks under plain tsx → use process.env), and 4 new pages (RRF concept, /api/search + /api/ask entities, embed-bookmarks script entity). Also fixed E1 (file-tree.md missing frontmatter) and regenerated the file tree to reflect the new SvelteKit project structure.

user: Search your bookmarks by meaning, or ask natural-language questions with cited answers
what: Shipped a new SvelteKit search app: a search UI backed by hybrid semantic+keyword ranking, plus an "Ask" mode that streams RAG answers grounded in your bookmarks with citations.
why: Lets you find and query 2,270 bookmarks by intent rather than exact text match. Live search goes active once you set OPENAI_API_KEY and run the embedding backfill.
next: Add an OpenAI API key to .env, run `npm run embed`, then `npm run dev` to try search and Ask mode.

user: Search works again — no more error when the page loads
what: The /api/search endpoint was returning 500 because the database connection string was missing inside the dev server. Fixed by loading dotenv in the shared db module.
why: Search is the core feature; a 500 on load made the whole app appear broken.
next: Reload the app — search returns results in under a second.
